general.fontSizeDescription: Adjust the font size for UI and terminal.

appearance.customCSSDescription: Override CSS variables to customize colors and styles.

terminal.themeDescription: Select terminal color themes for each mode.

editor.urlDescription: Enter the editor URL to open when clicking the EDITOR button in the header.
editor.urlHelp: Install and run code-server to use VS Code in the browser. The ?folder= parameter is automatically appended to the URL.

claude.skipPermissionsDescription: Adds --dangerously-skip-permissions option when running Claude CLI.

auth.changePasswordDescription: New passwords are hashed with SHA-512 before saving.

notification.enableDescription: Show system notifications when Claude tasks complete. Only works in the Electron app.

agent.enableMenuDescription: Show the agent menu in the sidebar. This feature is currently in beta.

system.tmuxResetDescription: Terminates all tmux sessions and {action}. Use when settings changes need to be applied.
system.tmuxResetConfirm: All running terminal processes will be terminated. Continue?

tailscale.notInstalledDescription: Install Tailscale to securely access from outside your network.
tailscale.commentMacAppStore: # or install from Mac App Store
tailscale.installGuide: For detailed installation instructions, visit <link>Tailscale official website</link>.
tailscale.nonDefaultPortTitle: Server is currently running on port {port}
tailscale.nonDefaultPortDescription: The default port ({defaultPort}) was in use, so a different port was automatically assigned. The auto-assigned port may change after {restartAction}, so it is recommended to set the local port to {defaultPort} instead of {currentPort} in Tailscale Serve settings.
tailscale.commentOrTerminate: # or terminate the process occupying port {port} and restart

quickPrompts.title: Quick Prompts
quickPrompts.description: Manage prompt buttons displayed above the input field.
quickPrompts.promptPlaceholder: e.g. Please review the current changes.
quickPrompts.resetDescription: All custom prompts will be deleted and built-in prompts will be enabled.
quickPrompts.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this prompt?

sidebarItems.title: Sidebar Items
sidebarItems.description: Manage shortcut items displayed at the bottom of the sidebar.
sidebarItems.resetDescription: All custom items will be deleted and built-in items will be enabled.
sidebarItems.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
